metadata.title: Plugins Annotations
metadata.description: Allows adding personal comments to each installed plugin.

regex.source: .error("Failed to create folder for Markdown file with annotations:",h)
regex.target: .error("Failed to create folder for Markdown file with annotations:",h)

regex.source: .error("Failed to write Markdown file with annotations:",l)
regex.target: .error("Failed to write Markdown file with annotations:",l)

regex.source: .error("Failed to save annotations to md file:",n)
regex.target: .error("Failed to save annotations to md file:",n)

regex.source: text:"Error: the filename must end with .md extension."
regex.target: text:"Error: the filename must end with .md extension."

regex.source: text:"On mobile devices, you can hover over plugins with your finger instead of using the mouse."
regex.target: text:"On mobile devices, you can hover over plugins with your finger instead of using the mouse."

regex.source: .setName("Delete placeholder text when inserting a new annotation")
regex.target: .setName("插入时删除占位符文本新注解")

regex.source: .setName("Create a backup copy of your current settings and annotations")
regex.target: .setName("创建当前的备份副本设置和注释")

regex.source: .setName("Annotations of no longer installed community plugins")
.setName("Automatically remove personal annotations of uninstalled plugins")
regex.target: .setName("自动删除个人已卸载插件的注释")

regex.source: .setDesc("If this option is enabled, the placeholder text will be deleted                     automatically when you start typing a new annotation. If disabled,                     the placeholder text will be selected for easier replacement.                     This is a minor customization.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用此选项，占位符文本将被删除，在您开始键入新注释时自动进行。如果禁用，占位符文本将被选中以便于替换。这是一个小的自定义。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If this option is enabled, aclickable icon linking to the plugin's GitHub page will be displayed in the Community plugin pane.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用此选项，则 Community plugin 窗格中将显示链接到插件 GitHub 页面的可单击图标。 ")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use the backup button to create an internal backup copy.                 You can customize the names of existing backups by clicking on their names once you have created them."+n).addButton(s=>s.setButtonText("Create Backup")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用 备份 按钮创建内部备份副本。您可以在创建现有备份后单击其名称来自定义现有备份的名称。 "+n).addButton(s=>s.setButtonText("Create Backup")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you plan to reinstall the plugin in the future,                 it is recommended not to remove your annotations, as you can reuse them later.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您打算在将来重新安装插件，建议不要删除您的注释，因为您可以稍后重复使用它们。 ")

regex.source: .appendText(" already exists. Do you want to replace the file with your personal annotations about the installed plugins? If you reply yes, the existing file is moved to the trash.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 已存在。您想用您关于已安装插件的个人注释替换该文件吗？如果回答“是”，则现有文件将移至回收站。")

regex.source: .appendText(" does not exist. Do you want to create it?")
.appendText("To add or edit your personal annotations for the installed plugins, go to the ")
regex.target: .appendText("要为已安装的插件添加或编辑您的个人注释，请转到 ")

regex.source: .appendText(" pane and click over the annotation field of the plugin you want to edit.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 窗格，然后单击要编辑的插件的注释字段。")

regex.source: .appendText("[[My notes/Review of plugin XYZ|my plugin note]]")
regex.target: .appendText("[[My notes/Review of plugin XYZ|my plugin note]]")

regex.source: .appendText("If disabled, the annotations cannot be edited from the preference pane and are thus                         protected against accidental changes.  In the ")
regex.target: .appendText("如果禁用，则无法从首选项窗格编辑批注，因此可以防止意外更改。 在 ")

regex.source: .appendText(" pane, you can coveniently change this setting by clicking on the displayed icon")
regex.target: .appendText(" 窗格中，您可以通过单击显示的图标来方便的更改此设置")

regex.source: .appendText("which either locks (make non-editable) or unlocks (make editable) your personal annotations.")
regex.target: .appendText("它们会锁定 （Make non-editable） 或解锁 （Make Editable） 您的个人注释。")

regex.source: .appendText("Markdown file where the plugins' annotations are stored (e.g, ")
regex.target: .appendText("存储插件注释的 Markdown 文件 (e.g, ")

regex.source: .appendText(`Choose the annotation label for the ${B} version of Obsidian.                 Use HTML code if you want to format it. Enter an empty string if you want                 to hide the label. Use `)
regex.target: .appendText(`Choose the annotation label for the ${B} version of Obsidian.                 Use HTML code if you want to format it. Enter an empty string if you want                 to hide the label. Use `)

regex.source: .appendText(" as a template for the plugin name; for example, you can generate automatic links to your notes with a label of the kind ")
regex.target: .appendText(" 作为插件名称的模板;例如，您可以使用以下类型的标签生成指向笔记的自动链接：")

regex.source: .appendText("Choose the label appearing where no user annotation is provied yet. Use ")
regex.target: .appendText("选择显示 no user annotation yet yet the user annotation 的标签。使用 ")

regex.target: .appendText(" 作为插件名称的模板;例如，您可以生成以下类型的占位符生成指向您的笔记的自动链接：")

regex.source: .appendText("If this option is enabled, only annotations set by the user                     will be shown. If you want to insert an annotation to a plugin for the first                     time, hover with the mouse over the chosen plugin in the ")
regex.target: .appendText("如果启用此选项，则仅显示用户设置的注释。如果要首次向插件插入注释，请将鼠标悬停在所选的插件 ")

regex.source: .appendText(" pane. The annotation field will appear automatically.")
regex.target: .appendText(" 面板。注释字段将自动显示。")

regex.source: .appendText("You are about to restore the settings from the backup named ")
regex.target: .appendText("您将要从以下名称的备份中恢复设置： ")

regex.target: .appendText("您将要删除以下名称的备份：")

regex.source: .innerText="You can enter rich text annotations using Markdown just the same way you do in Obsidian.                 Once you are finished editing, the Markdown annotation will be rendered correctly."
regex.target: .innerText="You can enter rich text annotations using Markdown just the same way you do in Obsidian.                 Once you are finished editing, the Markdown annotation will be rendered correctly."

regex.target: 使用Backup按钮创建内部备份副本。您可以通过单击以下选项来自定义现有备份的名称，一旦你创建了他们。使用导出和导入按钮复制当前设置和注释到外部文件，然后从外部文件恢复它们。

annnotations to an external file and, vicevera, to restore them from an external file.
